note: Groups existing shapes on a slide. 'shapes' takes comma-separated shape indices or DOM paths. Group bounding box auto-computed from member transforms. Shapes inside a group are addressable via /slide[N]/group[M]/shape[K] for direct Set/Get.

shapes.description: comma-separated shape indices (1,2,3) or paths (/slide[N]/shape[M] or /slide[N]/shape[@id=ID]). Required.
